title: corybas limpidus
intro: Corybas limpidus, also known as the 'Fairy Orchid', is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corybas limpidus are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
